positive: A detailed, symmetrical, minimalist illustration of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by delicate glowing constellations and stylized forest elements. The composition should feature strong contrast between deep indigo blues, celestial golds, and soft emerald greens. Use a linocut or woodcut aesthetic mixed with bioluminescent watercolor details. The owl should have a majestic, watchful pose, and the overall mood should be magical and serene. Designed for high-contrast apparel printing, clean lines, central composition, and distinct silhouettes. Intricate detail, vector quality, graphic novel art.
negative: blur, grainy, photo, realism, messy, signature, watermark, text, logo, cropped, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts
